info.title: ABDM ABHA API
info.description: Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission (ABDM) — ABHA (Ayushman Bharat Health Account) APIs for enrollment, login, care context linking, and consent management.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Generate JWT token for API access

tags.name: M1 - Aadhaar Enrollment
tags.description: Enroll and create ABHA using Aadhaar

tags.name: M1 - Profile
tags.description: Fetch profile, download ABHA card, get QR code

tags.name: M1 - ABHA Number Login (Aadhaar OTP)
tags.description: Login with ABHA number verified via Aadhaar OTP

tags.name: M1 - ABHA Number Login (Mobile OTP)
tags.description: Login with ABHA number verified via mobile OTP

tags.name: M1 - Aadhaar Number Login
tags.description: Login directly with Aadhaar number OTP

tags.name: M1 - ABHA Address Login (Aadhaar OTP)
tags.description: Login with ABHA address verified via Aadhaar OTP

tags.name: M1 - ABHA Address Login (Mobile OTP)
tags.description: Login with ABHA address verified via mobile OTP

tags.name: M1 - Search ABHA
tags.description: Search ABHA accounts by mobile number

tags.name: M2 - Deep Link
tags.description: Send deep link SMS to patient

tags.name: M2 - Link CareContext
tags.description: Link health records (care contexts) to ABHA

tags.name: M3 - Consent
tags.description: Consent request and health record retrieval

post.description: Exchange your API key for a JWT bearer token. This token must be passed as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` in all other API calls.
Send OTP to the mobile number linked with the provided Aadhaar number. Returns a `txnId` required for the verify step.
Verify the OTP sent to the Aadhaar-linked mobile. On success returns ABHA profile and session tokens.

200.description: OTP verified. Returns ABHA profile and tokens.

post.description: Get suggested ABHA address options for the user to choose from after OTP verification.
Create the final ABHA address for the user from the suggested list.
Send email verification link to the user's email address.
Fetch the complete ABHA profile for a user using their session token.
Download the ABHA health card as a base64-encoded image/PDF.
Get the ABHA QR code as a base64-encoded image.
Send OTP to the provided mobile number. Returns a `txnId` for the verify step.
Verify the OTP. On success returns a list of ABHA accounts linked to the mobile number.
Select a specific ABHA account from the list returned by verify-otp. Returns final session tokens.
Send OTP to the Aadhaar-linked mobile for login using ABHA number.
Verify the Aadhaar OTP to complete ABHA number login.
Send OTP to the mobile number for login using ABHA number.
Verify the mobile OTP to complete ABHA number login.
Send OTP to the Aadhaar-linked mobile number for login using Aadhaar number.
Verify the OTP and login. Returns ABHA accounts linked to the Aadhaar.

200.description: OTP verified. Returns tokens and accounts.

post.description: Send OTP to the Aadhaar-linked mobile for login using ABHA address.
Verify the Aadhaar OTP to complete ABHA address login. Returns user list and session tokens.

200.description: OTP verified. Returns users and tokens.

post.description: Fetch the ABHA address profile using the session token from the verify-otp step.
Send OTP to the mobile number for login using ABHA address.
Verify the mobile OTP to complete ABHA address login. Returns user list and session tokens.

200.description: OTP verified. Returns users and tokens.

post.description: Search for ABHA accounts linked to a mobile number. Returns a masked list of matching accounts.
Send OTP to the selected ABHA account's mobile number for verification.
Verify the OTP to authenticate the selected ABHA account. Returns session tokens.
Send a deep link SMS to the patient's ABHA-registered mobile to install or open the ABHA app.
Generate a link token for a given ABHA address and HIP. This token is required before linking care contexts.

Link one or more health records (care contexts) to the patient's ABHA. Supports the following `hiType` values: `Prescription`, `OPConsultation`, `DiagnosticReport`, `ImmunizationRecord`, `HealthDocumentRecord`, `DischargeSummary`, `Invoice`, `WellnessRecord`.

bundleData.description: Health record data. Structure varies by hiType.

post.description: Send a consent request to the patient to access their health records from HIPs.

get.description: Fetch health records shared by the patient under a given consent request ID.

parameters.name: requestid
parameters.description: Consent request UUID from the initiate consent response

200.description: Health records returned as FHIR bundles

fhirBundle.description: FHIR R4 Bundle resource containing the health record

message.example: OTP sent to mobile number ending with ******7158
